summary: A Complete Education for A Complete Person (BSCS_3:1) lecture will be held on Friday 6th Sept 2024 . The lecture will focus on Fundamentals of Big Data and Analytics . The syllabus includes 2 hours of lectures per week and 2 hours in-person practicals .

Introduction to Big Data
●Big Data refers to extremely large datasets that are difficult to 
process using traditional data processing applications and tools.

takeaways: A Complete Education for A Complete Person. The Department of Computing & Technology will teach students about the fundamentals of big data. The course will run from September 6th to September 6, 2024

Big Data refers to extremely large datasets that are difficult to process using traditional data processing applications and tools . Volume, velocity, variety, variety and veracity are characterized by their volume, velocity
A Complete Education for A Complete Person: Structured Data or Unstructured Data . Structured data makes up about 10-20% of generated data . Unstructuring data makes it
A Complete Education for A Complete Person (A) Complete Person) has both structured and unstructured data . The book is based on the work of the University of Uganda's Hado
